title: Add new default location for conmon
body: This will allow overriding the CRI-O version of conmon in our packages (and elsewhere, if we need to). No change on systems without a binary at that path, we'll just fall through to the next possible path (the old default)

comments.body: does anything need to change in the test suite for conmon location?
@baude I don't think so since conmon can be  passed in via the command line.
@baude Good catch, I added a check for the new location to the E2E tests

:pushpin: Commit 86da641 has been approved by `rhatdan`
